hero.eyebrow: // GOOGLE DEEPMIND SCHOLAR · AIMS SOUTH AFRICA × STELLENBOSCH UNIVERSITY
hero.intro: I'm Astride Melvin Fokam Ninyim — a Data Scientist and AI for Science researcher operating across <ml>Machine Learning</ml>, <quantum>Quantum Computing</quantum>, <climate>Climate Tech</climate>, and <bio>Biotech</bio>. COO at <synthi>SYNTHI AI</synthi>.

pillars.heading: Four pillars, one throughline: science that ships.

climate.title: AI for Science — Climate
climate.description: Deep learning on atmospheric reanalysis data to push weather and climate forecasting beyond classical numerical models.

quantum.title: Quantum Computing
quantum.description: Variational and hybrid quantum algorithms — from molecular simulation to quantum machine learning on real QPU hardware.

bio.title: Biotech & Public Health
bio.description: Computer vision and federated learning applied to disease surveillance, diagnosis, and health infrastructure across Africa.

systems.title: Applied AI Systems
systems.description: Full-stack, production-grade software that puts research-grade ML into the hands of real users.

projectHub.heading: Project Hub
projectHub.subtitle: {count} public repositories, filterable by research domain — plus the awards and publications that don't have a repo attached.

safechild.title: SafeChild Global
safechild.tagline: Biometric identity, SOS emergency response, and a multilingual AI assistant for citizen safety across Africa.

memoire-ontologie.title: Human-in-the-Loop Ontology Enrichment
memoire-ontologie.tagline: An LLM pipeline that proposes, reasons over, and safely enriches security knowledge graphs — nothing writes to the ontology without human review.

movie-recommender-system.title: MovieLens 32M Recommender
movie-recommender-system.tagline: A from-scratch ALS + BPR recommender engine engineered to run 32 million ratings on standard hardware.

quantum-computing-project.title: Quantum & Quantum ML Lab
quantum-computing-project.tagline: Variational and hybrid quantum algorithms — from VQE to quantum machine learning, executed on real QPU hardware.
metrics: GHZ states run on Rigetti “Garnet” QPU
Quantum ML for malware & clinical classification

aims-project.title: AIMS Master's Thesis — Atmospheric Forecasting
aims-project.tagline: Deep learning on ERA5 reanalysis data for atmospheric forecasting, developed as part of the AIMS South Africa / Google DeepMind Scholarship.
metrics: AIMS South Africa × Google DeepMind Scholar

ai-for-climate.title: AI for Climate
ai-for-climate.tagline: Climate indicator analysis, remote sensing pipelines, and ML weather-model benchmarking.

ai-for-public-health.title: AI for Public Health
ai-for-public-health.tagline: Computer vision for public-health infrastructure monitoring.

polarization-identification-nlp.title: Polarization Identification (EN / SW)
polarization-identification-nlp.tagline: Multi-task polarization detection in English and Swahili social media text.

netbank.title: Nedbank Transaction Forecasting
netbank.tagline: Forecasting 18M+ rows of bank transaction volume for the Nedbank / Zindi challenge.

cyberphysical-systems.title: Cyber-Physical Systems Lab
cyberphysical-systems.tagline: A structured learning system for CPS — IoT, autonomous vehicles, industrial control, edge computing.

my-project.title: Applied AI Portfolio
my-project.tagline: Broader applied-AI work spanning credit risk modeling, portfolio optimization, and multilingual NLP.
metrics: Credit risk: PD / LGD / EAD / EL modeling
5 domains: NLP, CV, Finance, Climate, ML

qualaria.title: Qualaria
qualaria.tagline: Accelerating antimalarial drug discovery with VQE, Qiskit Nature, and AlphaFold.

federated-respiratory-forecasting.title: Federated Learning for Respiratory Disease Forecasting
federated-respiratory-forecasting.tagline: Privacy-first federated learning for respiratory disease forecasting across African health systems.

plant-disease-diagnosis.title: Plant Disease Diagnosis
plant-disease-diagnosis.tagline: Published research on plant disease diagnosis using MobileNet and Inception architectures.

industry.label: INDUSTRY
industry.title: COO — SYNTHI AI
industry.description: Chief Operating Officer at SYNTHI AI, a global Agri-Tech & Climate Systems company — directing operations that put applied AI into the hands of real users and real farms.

scholarship.label: SCHOLARSHIP
scholarship.title: Google DeepMind Scholar
scholarship.description: Google DeepMind Scholar at the African Institute for Mathematical Sciences (AIMS) South Africa and Stellenbosch University, researching AI for atmospheric and climate science.

teaching.label: TEACHING & OUTREACH
teaching.title: Workshops & Scientific Outreach
teaching.description: Builds and delivers hands-on technical workshops — including Manim-animated explainers for cyber-physical systems — and maintains curated learning resources for the next generation of African scientists.

contact.heading: Let's build the next thing at the edge of science.
contact.subtitle: Open to research collaborations, quantum & climate AI projects, and conversations about applied ML in African contexts.
